title: Public Surface Polish
objective: 把 Personal Knowledge Asset OS 的公开展示层打磨到可发布状态，完善响应式体验、搜索订阅、性能 SEO 和发布前检查

tasks.title: Responsive layout audit and fixes
acceptance_criteria: Core pages are checked on mobile and desktop viewports
Text does not overlap or overflow fixed UI elements
Layout keeps a workbench feel rather than a marketing landing page
tasks.notes: Completed responsive audit report and migrated SemanticGraph drag handling from mouse events to pointer events for mobile touch support. Browser verification should be used when a local dev server is available.

tasks.title: Unify visual system and navigation
acceptance_criteria: Primary navigation exposes notes, projects, decks, resume and lab consistently
Color palette is restrained and not dominated by a single hue family
Repeated UI elements use consistent spacing, borders and typography
tasks.notes: Avoid decorative orb or gradient-heavy backgrounds.

tasks.title: Add local search index
acceptance_criteria: Search index covers notes, projects, decks and resume highlights
Search page works without server-side services
Index generation is part of the local asset build flow
tasks.notes: Keep search static-first; do not add a hosted search dependency.

tasks.title: Add RSS and Atom feeds
acceptance_criteria: RSS feed includes public notes and projects with stable URLs
Atom feed mirrors the same source set
Feed generation is reproducible from npm scripts
tasks.notes: Only include content marked as publishable if such metadata exists.

tasks.title: Performance and SEO pass
acceptance_criteria: Pages include title, description and canonical metadata
Sitemap and robots files exist or generation is documented
Performance report captures bundle, asset and image risks
tasks.notes: Prefer static metadata derived from content frontmatter.

tasks.title: Release walkthrough and deployment decision
acceptance_criteria: Release readiness report lists commands run and blockers
Deployment target recommendation is updated with rationale
No external deploy or publish action is performed without explicit human approval
tasks.notes: Publishing remains gated by Sense L4 approval.
